ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the news article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text content of the news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the news article was published */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest stock price on the trading date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest stock price on the trading date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening stock price on the trading date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing stock price on the trading date */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "stock_symbols" TEXT /* Stock symbols mentioned in the article */,
  "company_names" TEXT /* Names of the companies mentioned in the article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the news article */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in stock price */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  "article_language" TEXT /* Language of the news article */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of news article (e.g., press release, financial report) */,
  "article_location" TEXT /* Geographical location or region the news is about */,
  "article_keywords" TEXT /* Key terms or phrases for better search and categorization */,
  "article_sentiment_detail" TEXT /* Detailed sentiment analysis (e.g., positive, negative, neutral scores) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES news_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_symbols FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbols") REFERENCES companies ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the news source */,
  "source_reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability or trustworthiness score of the news source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of news source (e.g., financial website, social media, press release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest stock price on the trading date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest stock price on the trading date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening stock price on the trading date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing stock price on the trading date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades on the trading date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, considering stock splits and dividends */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "previous_close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the previous trading day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES companies ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "company_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "company_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "company_sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "company_subsector" TEXT /* Subsector the company operates in */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the company */,
  "company_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, investor) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Active status of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  "user_profile_image" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "user_state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "user_country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "user_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the user */,
  "user_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "watchlist" TEXT /* Watchlist of stock symbols the user is following */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings for the user */,
  "preference_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for personalized news and alerts */,
  "preference_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., news article, stock price) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" REAL /* Revenue growth rate */,
  "net_income_growth_rate" REAL /* Net income growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company news item */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news item */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text content of the news item */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date and time the news item was published */,
  "news_url" TEXT /* URL of the news item */,
  "news_language" TEXT /* Language of the news item */,
  "news_type" TEXT /* Type of news (e.g., press release, financial report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "event_title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, past, canceled) */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., in-person, virtual, hybrid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_events_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management personnel */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the management personnel */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the management personnel */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the management personnel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the management personnel */,
  "management_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the management personnel */,
  "management_birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the management personnel */,
  "management_tenure" TEXT /* Tenure in the current position */,
  "management_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the management personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_management_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "competitor_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the competitor */,
  "competitor_url" TEXT /* URL of the competitor's official website */,
  "competitor_market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the competitor */,
  "competitor_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the competitor is listed */,
  "competitor_sector" TEXT /* Sector the competitor operates in */,
  "competitor_subsector" TEXT /* Subsector the competitor operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_competitors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
